title: Addis Rectangular Washing Up Bowl, Linen, 9.5 Litre, 38cm x 14cm
features: Easy to clean hard wearing plastic
9.5 litre capacity is large enough to accommodate a 10 plate flat in the base
Raised feet allows water to drain underneath
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. 8L Capacity This bowl has an 8 litre capacity which is perfect for washing dishes due to it's roomy nature. BPA Free Made from totally BPA free plastic this bowl is sturdy and safe. Dimensions W29cm X H14cm X D33cm
